_comment: Tier-2 cheap fixture for helmholtz#0: SolverCG fails on the indefinite/singular Helmholtz operator (K - k^2 M) when k^2 is placed at an eigenvalue of K. SolverControl::NoConvergence is raised after max_steps. NOTE: the catalog Signal originally said 'breakdown immediately' — the empirical observable in deal.II 9.1.1 is NoConvergence at max_steps, not a literal breakdown call. Signal text rewritten to match reality. Falsifiability classification stays cheap, method stays exception_class.
